companies.name: Ryan Brothers Waste Recycling Services

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved directly from ryanbros.ie/domestic-pricing-options/. Ryan Brothers serves Tipperary, Laois, Offaly, and Kilkenny.

companies.service_notes: Billed every 6 months. Brown bin delivered where available (rollout ongoing). Weight allowances apply to general waste and brown bin waste. Plans named by bin size.

plans.notes: Billed every 6 months. Brown bin included where available. Weight allowances apply.

companies.name: Panda Green

confidence.reason: Pricing retrieved directly from panda.ie signup flow for 1 High Street, Kilkenny.

companies.service_notes: Glass bin included for Kilkenny. Compost rollout ongoing in rural areas — may not be available at all addresses. €0.25/kg excess on waste. Unlimited recycling and compost included in flat plans.

plans.notes: Unlimited recycling and compost included. Glass bin included.

plans.notes: Unlimited recycling and compost included. Glass bin included.

plans.notes: Unlimited recycling and compost included. Glass bin included.
